parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", max_completion_tokens: 4000, messages: [ { role: "system", content: `You are a professional meeting recorder. Output ONLY complete, valid HTML. Never cut off mid-tag. Always close every HTML tag properly. SPEAKER NAMES: - PM → ${$('Format Transcript').item.json.pm_name || 'PM'} - CLIENT → ${$('Format Transcript').item.json.client_name || 'Client'} DATE: ${$('Format Transcript').item.json.meetingDate} OUTPUT THIS EXACT HTML STRUCTURE IN ORDER: [1] HEADER div — background:#1F4E79; color:white; padding:28px 36px; border-radius:10px 10px 0 0 - h1: meeting title (font-size:22px) - p: Date · Client: [name] · PM: [name] (color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-size:13px) [2] AGENDA BAR div — background:#EBF3FB; border:1px solid #B5D4F4; padding:12px 36px - Show only topics actually discussed as: 1. Topic · 2. Topic · etc - font-size:12px; color:#185FA5 [3] TOPIC SECTIONS — one per discussed topic only, skip if not discussed Each section: - Topic badge: background:#1F4E79; color:white; border-radius:20px; padding:3px 14px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600 - Horizontal line after badge - Dialogue bubbles: PM bubble: background:#F0FAF5; border:1px solid #A8D5B9; border-radius:0 8px 8px 8px; padding:10px 14px PM label: background:#0F6E56; color:white; font-size:11px; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:4px CLIENT bubble: background:#EBF3FB; border:1px solid #B5D4F4; border-radius:0 8px 8px 8px; padding:10px 14px CLIENT label: background:#185FA5; color:white; font-size:11px; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:4px [4] MEETING SUMMARY div — background:#F8F9FA; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; padding:20px 24px; margin:20px 36px - Label: "MEETING SUMMARY" font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:#1F4E79; margin-bottom:10px - Summary paragraph: font-size:13px; line-height:1.7; color:#2c3e50 [5] NEXT STEPS div — background:#FFF3E0; border:1px solid #FAC775; border-radius:8px; padding:16px 24px; margin:0 36px 20px - Label: "NEXT STEPS" font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:#633806; margin-bottom:10px - Each step: → arrow + text, font-size:13px; color:#2c3e50; margin-bottom:6px [6] SUMMARY TABLE — margin:0 36px 36px; width:calc(100% - 72px) - Columns: Topic | Key Points | Decisions Made | Action Owner - table style: border-collapse:collapse; width:100% - th style: background:#1F4E79; color:white; padding:12px 16px; text-align:left; font-size:12px - td style: border:1px solid #ddd; padding:10px 14px; font-size:13px; vertical-align:top - Even rows: background:#f8f9fa - One row per topic discussed - Key Points: use
between points - Decisions Made: actual decision or "To be discussed" - Action Owner: actual person name IMPORTANT RULES: - Return ONLY HTML, zero markdown, zero backticks - Close EVERY tag properly — - Do NOT stop mid-tag or mid-table - Wrap everything in:
` }, { role: "user", content: $('Format Transcript').item.json.transcript } ] }) }}
